evidence: RuntimeError: Expected all tensors to be on the same device, but got index is on cuda:X, different from other tensors on cpu (wrapper_CUDA__index_select). All 8 ranks hit this. Occurs during trainer.compute_loss -> model forward -> DMS attention. Likely an index tensor in DMS attention wrapper not being moved to the correct device.
proposed_action: Fix device placement in DMS attention wrapper (src/memory/dms/dms_attention.py) - ensure all index tensors are on the same device as the hidden states

reason: High-priority bug blocking all sparse memory training. Clear root cause (shared memory banks across layers). Coder spawned to implement Option 2 fix (per-layer independent memory banks).
recommended_action: Create independent SparseMemoryBank per layer in training script, verify no weight sharing

decision: approved option B - delegate to coder
reason: Script should load .jsonl directly via tokenizer. More flexible than regenerating .npy. Also fix seq_len to match available data.
Simplify experiment configs to use only existing args first. Add L0/L1 args only after basic pipeline works.

DMS Qwen3-8B architecture compatibility fixed. All issues resolved: 5D mask tensor bug, GQA incompatibility, bf16 NaN/FPE, device mismatch, past_key_values passthrough. Smoke test passed - no errors, no NaN. Ready for training launch.
recommended_action: Spawn trainer to launch DMS training (4x/8x compression)

reason: Clear code bug: torch.finfo() called on bool attn_mask.dtype at line 202. Fix proposed in request matches pattern from line 115. Urgent - blocking DMS training.
recommended_action: Fix line 202 in src/memory/dms/dms_attention.py to handle bool dtype

reason: Device bug occurred in dms_8x_fixed run. Current dms_8x run is healthy (possibly due to base model freeze), but the underlying issue should still be fixed for robustness. Proposed fix targets index tensor device placement in DMS attention wrapper.
recommended_action: Fix device placement in src/memory/dms/dms_attention.py - ensure all index tensors are on same device as hidden states. Do NOT interrupt current healthy dms_8x run.
